Interface ILasSurface

ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members of LasSurface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("81792712-2296-4B3F-BA19-3D37BD0B245D")]
public interface ILasSurface

Properties

CanDoCurvature

Indicates if earth curvature can be applied.

bool CanDoCurvature { get; }

Property Value

bool
